# apps/api/app/models

Pydantic model layer defining request/response schemas for document ingestion (DocumentCreate, DocumentResponse), chunk storage (ChunkRecord), pitch viewer serialization (PitchChunk, PitchDocument, PitchResponse), and RAG query pipeline contracts (QueryCreate, QueryResponse, Citation).

## Contents

### **Document Management**
- [document.py](./document.py) тАФ `DocumentCreate` (request), `DocumentResponse` (single doc), `DocumentListResponse` (paginated collection)
- [chunk.py](./chunk.py) тАФ `ChunkRecord` schema for Supabase storage with `embedding: list[float]`, `chunk_type: Literal["text", "table", "heading", "image_caption"]`, `token_count: int`

### **Pitch Viewer API**
- [pitch.py](./pitch.py) тАФ `PitchChunk`, `PitchDocument`, `PitchResponse` (API-facing serialization models without embeddings)

### **Query Pipeline**
- [query.py](./query.py) тАФ `QueryCreate` (input), `QueryResponse` (output tracking), `Citation` (source reference with `relevance_score: float`)

## Model Relationships

- `DocumentCreate` тЖТ validated by `apps/api/app/api/v1/documents.py::upload_document()` тЖТ persisted as `DocumentResponse`
- `ChunkRecord` тЖТ consumed by `apps/api/app/services/ingestion.py::store_chunks()` тЖТ read by `apps/api/app/services/retrieval.py`
- `PitchResponse` тЖТ serialized by `apps/api/app/api/v1/pitch.py::get_pitch_documents()` тЖТ consumed by `apps/web/lib/pitch-api.ts::fetchPitchDocuments()`
- `QueryResponse` тЖТ returned by `apps/api/app/api/v1/query.py::create_query()` тЖТ parsed by `apps/web/hooks/use-query-stream.ts`

## Behavioral Contracts

### File Type Enumeration
- `file_type: Literal["pdf", "xlsx", "md", "txt"]` (DocumentCreate, DocumentResponse)

### Chunk Type Taxonomy
- `chunk_type: Literal["text", "table", "heading", "image_caption"]` (ChunkRecord, PitchChunk)

### Status Values
- QueryResponse `status: str = "pending"` (default, overridden at runtime by query_engine.py)

### Default Structures
- `metadata: dict = {}` (ChunkRecord, PitchChunk)
- DocumentResponse `purpose: str = "pitch"` (default purpose field)
